case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. RASHIBA SESSION et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT-UNLAWFUL DETAINER-PRE-JUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY SERVED JAN-29-2004, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SESSION, RASHIBA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SESSION, RASHIBA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 114 BROOKDALE AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT SESSION, RASHIBA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SESSION, RASHIBA
